'''chavate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wordily|wordily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wordily|wordily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chavate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chavate|chavate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chavatesher|chavatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chavatesherĂ«m|chavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chavatero|chavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chavateshĂ«|chavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chavateshĂ«m|chavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichavatero|gokichavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichavateshĂ«|gokichavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichavateshĂ«m|gokichavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochavankerom|gochavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochavankeshĂ«|gochavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochavankeshĂ«m|gochavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochavankeya|gochavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chavaterom|chavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chavatemu|chavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chavateya|chavateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichavaterom|gokichavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichavatemu|gokichavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichavateya|gokichavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chavavate|chavavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chavavatesher|chavavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chavavatesherĂ«m|chavavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chavavatero|chavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chavavateshĂ«|chavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chavavateshĂ«m|chavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichavavatero|gokichavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichavavateshĂ«|gokichavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichavavateshĂ«m|gokichavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochavavankerom|gochavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochavavankeshĂ«|gochavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochavavankeshĂ«m|gochavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochavavankeya|gochavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chavavaterom|chavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chavavatemu|chavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chavavateya|chavavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichavavaterom|gokichavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichavavatemu|gokichavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichavavateya|gokichavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠvĂŠte|chĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠvĂŠtesher|chĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠvĂŠtero|chĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠvĂŠtero|gokichĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠvĂŠterom|chĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠvĂŠtemu|chĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠvĂŠteya|chĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠvĂŠterom|gokichĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠvĂŠteya|gokichĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafvafte|chafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafvaftesher|chafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafvaftesherĂ«m|chafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafvaftero|chafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafvafteshĂ«|chafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafvafteshĂ«m|chafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafvaftero|gokichafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafvafteshĂ«|gokichafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafvafteshĂ«m|gokichafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafvafnkerom|gochafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafvafnkeshĂ«|gochafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafvafnkeshĂ«m|gochafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafvafnkeya|gochafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafvafterom|chafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafvaftemu|chafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafvafteya|chafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafvafterom|gokichafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafvaftemu|gokichafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafvafteya|gokichafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
